tasks.subject: Task 1: Shared loopback-origin guard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace dev_seed.go's localhost-only guard with a shared `isLoopbackOrigin` helper that also accepts hostnames resolving entirely to loopback; hermetic unit test.

**Files:** Modify cmd/prohibitorum/dev_seed.go (add `net` import, isLoopbackOrigin, use in runDevSeed); Test cmd/prohibitorum/dev_seed_test.go (create).

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/prohibitorum/ -run TestIsLoopbackOrigin -v` -> PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/prohibitorum/dev_seed.go", "cmd/prohibitorum/dev_seed_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/prohibitorum/ -run TestIsLoopbackOrigin -v && go build -tags nodynamic ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["isLoopbackOrigin handles loopback names/IP-literals/malformed/empty", "runDevSeed uses helper", "build+test pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: dev-federation wiring command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New idempotent dev-only `dev-federation` subcommand that connects to both DBs and wires the full federation setup + prints summary/PKCE recipe.

**Files:** Create cmd/prohibitorum/dev_federation.go; Modify cmd/prohibitorum/main.go:782 (register via addDevFederationCmd).

**Verify:** `go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./...` clean (full behavior live in T6).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/prohibitorum/dev_federation.go", "cmd/prohibitorum/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 flags required + loopback guard", "signing keys/fed client/idp rows/test-rp/invite all wired idempotently", "summary+PKCE recipe printed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: dev-federation orchestrator script
tasks.description:
**Goal:** scripts/dev-federation.sh — foreground lifecycle: source local config, ensure 2 DBs, build once, per-instance dev-seed+enroll-admin, wire, generate nginx vhost, launch 2 loopback-http backends, banner, Ctrl-C cleanup. No real infra in the file.

**Files:** Create scripts/dev-federation.sh (chmod +x).

**Verify:** `shellcheck scripts/dev-federation.sh`; first-run writes template + exits 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/dev-federation.sh"], "verifyCommand": "shellcheck scripts/dev-federation.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["template-on-first-run + exit 1", "ensures DBs/build/seed/enroll/wire/nginx/launch", "shellcheck clean", "no real infra hardcoded"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: mise dev:federation task
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose the orchestrator as `mise run dev:federation` (args passthrough for --fresh).

**Files:** Modify mise.toml (add [tasks."dev:federation"] after dev:seed).

**Verify:** `mise tasks 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'dev:federation' && echo OK`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mise.toml"], "verifyCommand": "mise tasks 2>/dev/null | grep dev:federation", "acceptanceCriteria": ["task registered", "args passthrough"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Docs (TOOLING.md + README)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the harness with placeholder domains only.

**Files:** Modify TOOLING.md (### dev:federation subsection); Modify README.md (one-line pointer).

**Verify:** `grep -q 'dev:federation' TOOLING.md README.md && echo OK`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["TOOLING.md", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -q 'dev:federation' TOOLING.md && grep -q 'dev:federation' README.md && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TOOLING.md section w/ placeholders", "README pointer"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Verification gate (build/test + live run + no-leak)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove end-to-end + no real-infra leak into git.

**Files:** none (verification only).

**Verify:** go gate; live `mise run dev:federation -- --fresh` (keys+discovery+summary); idempotent re-run (1 active key each); git grep no real domain; `git status --porcelain .dev` empty.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["go gate green", "live run: keys+discovery+summary", "idempotent re-run clean", "no real domain in tracked files"]}
```
